name: Maestro
description: OpenCode Agent to orchestrate a squad of agents for complex multi-step workflows.

name: Code Reviewer
description: AI-powered CLI that reviews pull requests, flags anti-patterns, and suggests improvements using LLM analysis.

name: Doc Gen
description: Generate API docs, ADRs, and README files from your codebase using LLM-driven static analysis.

name: Test Pilot
description: AI agent that generates unit and integration tests by analyzing your source code and domain logic.

name: Incident AI
description: On-call assistant that correlates logs, metrics, and traces to surface root cause during incidents.

name: Refactor Bot
description: Detects code smells and technical debt, then generates safe refactoring PRs with full test coverage.

name: Compliance Auditor
description: CLI tool to audit your codebase for compliance issues across SDLC stages.

name: Infra Pilot
description: Infrastructure-as-Code scaffolding and drift detection for Kubernetes, Terraform, and Pulumi.

name: CI Forge
description: Generate and optimize CI/CD pipelines for GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, and CircleCI from a single config.

name: Vuln Scanner
description: Scan container images, dependencies, and IaC templates for known CVEs and misconfigurations.

name: EOL Monitor
description: Track end-of-life dates for your dependencies, runtimes, and OS versions. Get alerts before they expire.

name: Cost Lens
description: Monitor and forecast cloud spending across AWS, GCP, and Azure. Surface anomalies and unused resources.

name: Secret Guard
description: Pre-commit and CI hook that detects leaked secrets, tokens, and credentials in your codebase.

name: Env Sync
description: Synchronize environment variables and secrets across dev, staging, and production from a single source of truth.

name: Deploy Wave
description: Zero-downtime deployment orchestrator with canary releases, rollback, and health-check gating.

name: DB Migrate
description: Schema migration runner with diff previews, rollback safety, and multi-database support.
